title: Gritty Ethiopian Lemongrass Ye Beg Aliche
description: Smoky, snappy monsoon dish with lemongrass-takrai broth, brine-dry spices, and Ayurvedic tamasic-friendly flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and smashed lemongrass, cooking until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add smoked paprika, dried hibiscus, and black salt, stirring for 30 seconds.
Pour in diced tomatoes and vegetable broth, bringing the mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes, allowing flavors to develop.
Stir in cooked chickpeas and cook another 5 minutes until heated through.
Discard the lemongrass stalks and strain the broth if desired.
Season with fresh cilantro if desired and stir well.
Serve hot over cooked teff or injera.
